name: Recent Zip Code Performance for Bath

content.query:
SELECT 
[ZipCode] as [Zip Code]
,max(City) as City
,max(County) as County
,max(State) as State
,max(zipPerf.Division) as Division
,sum([NetSalesAmount]) as [Net Sales Amount]
,sum([CancelledAmount]) as [Cancelled Amount]
,sum([CreditDeclineAmount]) as [Credit Decline Amount]
,sum([CancelledCount]) as [Cancelled Count]
,sum([CreditDeclineCount]) as [Credit Decline Count]
,sum([GrossSalesAmount]) as [Gross Sales Amount]
,sum(ApptSet) as [Appt Set]
,sum(NetIssue) as [Net Issue]
,sum(Demo) as Demo
,sum(Sold) as Sold
,sum(NetSold) as [Net Sold]
,sum(LeadCount) as [Lead Count]
,max(PopulationEstimate) as [Population Estimate]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE] zipPerf
 ,[EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
 where 
 zipPerf.ProductID = prd.ProductID
 and prd.ProductName in 
 (
    'Bath',
    'Shwr',
    'BathK',
    'Bath',
    'Bath',
    'Sbath',
    'WIS',
    'Bath',
    'ShBth',
    'WetAreaBth'
 )
 and EntryMonth between '2023-01-01' and '2023-04-30'
 group by
 [ZipCode]
 order by 
 [Net Sales Amount] desc
